creator: philip@FreeBSD.org
text:
ftp0.chi and ftp0.nyi are up again.  I've reverted my earlier change to gdnsd.

Both mirrors are seeing traffic again.

ftp0.tuk should hopefully come online again soon.

ftp0.fmt is somewhere on the list, but not at the top.

Marking this Closed/FIXED.  I've made a note to check why gdnsd wasn't sending users in North America to Europe without being forced to.
